scripts.start:backend: cd backend && npm install && firebase emulators:start
scripts.start:ai: cd ai-transform && pip install -r requirements.txt && docker build -t ai-transform . && docker run -p 8000:8000 ai-transform
scripts.start:mobile: cd mobile && npm install && expo start
scripts.start:all: concurrently "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:ai" "npm run start:mobile"
